title: Query Garden
text:
0.1 Editable SQL
Query Garden turns ordinary SQL code blocks into browser-run examples backed by sqlime. The queries below run against the bundled HR sample database.

title: Query Garden
text:
0.2 Dialect Styling

select employee_id, first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;

title: Query Garden
text:
0.3 Chunk-Registered Database

select department_id, department_name, location_id
from departments
limit 5;

title: Query Garden
text:
0.4 Legacy Class Form

select country_id, country_name, region_id
from countries
limit 5;

title: Query Garden
text:
0.5 More Examples

HTML examples
Revealjs slide examples
Python wrapper examples
R wrapper examples

title: 2  Query Garden Example
text:
2.2 Chunk-registered database


select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;

title: 2  Query Garden Example
text:
2.3 Legacy class-based form

select region_id, region_name
from regions
limit 2;

title: 3  Query Garden Python Wrapper Example
crumbs: 3  Query Garden Python Wrapper Example

title: 3  Query Garden Python Wrapper Example
text:
import sys
sys.path.append("../_extensions/query-garden/resources/python")
from querygarden import emit_sql_block

emit_sql_block(
    "select * from regions;",
    db="hr",
    dialect="postgresql",
)

select * from regions;
crumbs: 3  Query Garden Python Wrapper Example

title: 3  Query Garden Python Wrapper Example
text:
3.2 Generated From A SQL File
from querygarden import emit_sql_block_from_file

emit_sql_block_from_file(
    "sample-query.sql",
    db="hr",
    dialect="mysql",
)

select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;
crumbs: 3  Query Garden Python Wrapper Example

title: 4  Query Garden R Wrapper Example
crumbs: 4  Query Garden R Wrapper Example

title: 4  Query Garden R Wrapper Example
text:
source("../_extensions/query-garden/resources/r/querygarden.R")

query_garden_emit_sql_block(
  "select * from regions;",
  db = "hr",
  dialect = "postgresql"
)

select * from regions;
crumbs: 4  Query Garden R Wrapper Example

title: 4  Query Garden R Wrapper Example
text:
4.2 Generated From A SQL File
query_garden_emit_sql_block_from_file(
  "sample-query.sql",
  db = "hr",
  dialect = "mysql"
)

select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;
crumbs: 4  Query Garden R Wrapper Example

title: 5  Revealjs Slides
text:
5.1 Covered Layouts
Query Garden includes a standalone revealjs deck for checking presentation layouts and output-location behavior.
Open the rendered deck here: Query Garden Revealjs Example.
The slide source is kept in examples/query-garden-revealjs.qmd, separate from the book chapters, because it renders with format: revealjs.
